Absolute returns The total return of a mutual fund over a given period. Returns and rankings Annualised returns Absolute returns Name 3Y 5Y 10Y All Fund returns +16.3% +15.4% +15.3% +14.9% Category average ( Equity Large Cap ) +15.1% +15.0% +13.2% -- Rank ( Equity Large Cap ) 29 6 3 -- Understand terms Expense ratio A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments. It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses. Tax A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund. Exit load A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment. Stamp duty A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security. Exit Load 06 Apr 2026 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 month. 01 Jan 2013 Exit load of 1% if redeemed upto 1 year.

Exit Load 06 Apr 2026 Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 month. 01 Jan 2013 Exit load of 1% if redeemed upto 1 year. Exit load, stamp duty and tax Exit load Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 month. Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020) from July 1st 2020 Tax implication If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%. Also manages these schemes ICICI Prudential Large Cap Fund Direct Growth ICICI Prudential Focused Equity Fund Direct Growth ICICI Prudential Technology Direct Plan Growth ICICI Prudential Innovation Fund Direct Growth About ICICI Prudential Large Cap Fund Direct Growth ICICI Prudential Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by ICICI Prudential Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 12 Oct 1993. Sharmila D'Silva is the Current Fund Manager of ICICI Prudential Large Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. Latest NAV as of 06 May 2026 is ₹119.39. The ICICI Prudential Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk.

The ICICI Prudential Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 1 month. ; Investment Objective The scheme seeks to generate long term capital appreciation and income distribution to investors from a portfolio that is predominantly invested in equity and equity related securities of large cap companies.
